## Verses (8)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | God is in the meeting-place of God; he is judging among the gods. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | How long will you go on judging falsely, having respect for the persons of evil-doers? (Selah.) | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Give ear to the cause of the poor and the children without fathers; let those who are troubled and in need have their rights. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | Be the saviour of the poor and those who have nothing: take them out of the hand of the evil-doers. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | They have no knowledge or sense; they go about in the dark: all the bases of the earth are moved. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | I said, You are gods; all of you are the sons of the Most High: | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | But you will come to death like men, falling like one of the rulers of the earth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | Up! O God, come as judge of the earth; for all the nations are your heritage. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
